content:
# Memory Effect

**Summary**: The dependence of the current state of a system on its past history, modeled by alpha.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-khan-2|Khan, 2013]] investigated the effect of memory parameter alpha on pressure transient data.

## Scientific Context

- [[2013-khan-2|Khan, 2013]] Represents anomalous diffusion in porous media.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2013-khan-2|Khan, 2013]] Modeled using fractional derivatives.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Higher values of alpha lead to higher bottom hole flowing pressures (slower pressure drop). ([[2013-khan-2|Khan, 2013, p. 75]])
